notes: Use the direct Notion REST workflow for schema, rows, and markdown content.
Use Notion MCP for saved database views when MCP auth is healthy.
Keep Playwright as a fallback only when MCP auth is unavailable or view drift needs browser repair.

views.name: Portfolio Home
views.purpose: Default decision view for scanning what each project is, where it stands, and what to do next.
views.configure: SHOW "Name", "Current State", "Portfolio Call", "One-Line Pitch", "Next Move", "Biggest Blocker", "Momentum", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: Resume Now
views.purpose: Projects that are already active and easiest to pick back up quickly.
views.configure: FILTER "Current State" = "Active Build"; SHOW "Name", "Next Move", "Start Here", "Primary Run Command", "Setup Friction", "Runs Locally", "Last Meaningful Work", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: Worth Finishing
views.purpose: Projects with enough maturity that a focused push could get them demoable or shipped.
views.configure: FILTER "Portfolio Call" = "Finish"; SHOW "Name", "Build Maturity", "Ship Readiness", "Effort to Demo", "Effort to Ship", "Next Move", "Biggest Blocker", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: Needs Decision
views.purpose: Projects whose next step is strategic judgment rather than more implementation.
views.configure: FILTER "Current State" = "Needs Decision"; SHOW "Name", "Portfolio Call", "One-Line Pitch", "Value / Outcome", "Biggest Blocker", "Monetization / Strategic Value", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: Needs Review
views.purpose: Rows where the evidence is thin or the generated summary still needs a human check.
views.configure: FILTER "Needs Review" = true; SHOW "Name", "Evidence Confidence", "Docs Quality", "Test Posture", "Start Here", "Next Move", "Biggest Blocker"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: Cold Storage
views.purpose: Parked, archived, or otherwise low-momentum projects kept out of the main operating view.
views.configure: FILTER "Momentum" = "Cold"; SHOW "Name", "Current State", "Portfolio Call", "One-Line Pitch", "Next Move", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC

views.name: By Category
views.purpose: Grouped portfolio scan for spotting clusters, gaps, and category-level imbalance.
views.configure: GROUP BY "Category"; SHOW "Current State", "Portfolio Call", "Momentum", "Next Move", "Last Active"

views.name: Gallery Snapshot
views.purpose: Visual skim view for understanding each project at a glance without opening the full page.
views.configure: SHOW "One-Line Pitch", "Current State", "Portfolio Call", "Next Move", "Biggest Blocker", "Last Active"; SORT BY "Last Active" DESC
